data.title: Dow Jones drops after surprise CPI inflation report; Nvidia stock falls. Biotech leader slammed by FDA news.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following an unexpected CPI inflation report. During morning trading, Nvidia stock also saw a decrease. The stock market faced challenges as the Dow dropped in response to the inflation data. Additionally, significant news from the FDA negatively impacted a leading biotech company. This live coverage summarized the day's market movements, including these events that affected key stocks and indices.
Axios reporter: The heads of the National Security Council of the Trump administration held a discussion today on the topic of Iran. President Trump did not participate.

data.title: Bank Leumi issues EUR 750 million covered bonds to foreign investors, a first in Israel with lower interest rates.
data.description: Israel's Bank Leumi has become the pioneering bank in the country to launch covered bonds internationally, a novel form of debt security that offers reduced financing expenses compared to regular corporate bonds. The total value of the bonds issued reached EUR 750 million. This achievement by Bank Leumi marks a significant development in the financial landscape of Israel.

data.title: Senate will test stablecoin rewards provisions in crypto bill with the CLARITY Act marking Thursday, amid disagreement on DeFi, stablecoins, and ethics.
data.description: On Thursday, the CLARITY Act is set for a markup, and disagreements may persist among some government officials regarding decentralized finance, stablecoins, and ethical considerations.

data.title: MOBE teams up with Sidekick Health to offer full-risk platform for multiple chronic conditions in Minneapolis.
data.description: In Minneapolis, MOBE has announced a partnership and investment in Sidekick Health to provide a comprehensive platform for addressing various chronic conditions. This collaboration aims to offer a full-risk, integrated solution for managing multiple health issues.

data.title: Bunkerhill Health's Carebricks platform deployed at UTMB Health for clinician-led AI workflows, serving over 1M patient visits annually.
data.description: Bunkerhill Health has implemented its Carebricks platform at the University of Texas Medical Branch in San Francisco. The platform supports care delivery through AI workflows led by clinicians, catering to a health system that handles more than one million patient visits each year. UTMB Health has transitioned from individual AI projects to a comprehensive system approach with the adoption of Bunkerhill's Carebricks platform, incorporating ideas from clinicians and operators into operational strategies.

data.title: Inventor from Harvey, La. creates MUNCHCAP to protect hair while eating, reduces cleanup. #innovation #MUNCHCAP
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Harvey, Louisiana shared their innovation with the creation of the MUNCHCAP. This cap is designed to shield a child's hair from food, sauces, and liquids during mealtime, reducing cleanup efforts post-meals. The inventor aimed to streamline the daily routine by introducing this novel product.

data.title: USA Rail Terminals opens new rail terminal in Monroe, Louisiana to support Meta's data center project.
data.description: A new rail terminal in Monroe, Louisiana has recently started operations, managed by USA Rail Terminals. This facility aims to boost rail-to-truck logistics capacity for supporting construction work linked to Meta's Richland Parish Data Center in Holly. The center is expected to enhance data infrastructure in the area and foster economic growth.
